Prescription Details

Print Prescription
Patient: {{ prescription.patient_name }}
Prescription ID: #{{ prescription.id }}
{% if prescription.filled %} FILLED {% else %} PENDING {% endif %}
{% for item in prescription.items.all %} {% endfor %}
Medicine Dosage Qty Subtotal
{{ item.medicine.name }}
{{ item.medicine.brand }} 		{{ item.dosage }} {{ item.quantity }} ₦{{ item.item_total|floatformat:2 }}
Grand Total ₦{{ prescription.total_price|floatformat:2 }}
Registered: {{ prescription.date_prescribed|date:"M d, Y (h:i A)" }}
{% if prescription.filled %}
Filled by: {{ prescription.filled_by.username|title }} • {{ prescription.filled_date|date:"M d, Y (h:i A)" }}
{% endif %}
{% if not prescription.filled and user.is_admin or not prescription.filled and user.is_pharmacist or not prescription.filled and user.is_assistant %}
{% if not prescription.items.exists %}
This prescription has no items.
{% else %}
Confirm all items are available before marking as filled.
{% csrf_token %}
{% endif %}
{% endif %}
{% endblock %}
